heading: Office of Special Trustee for American Indians
label: 5634 Office of Special Trustee for American Indians

(b), is , , , which was classified principally to subchapter II (§ 450 et seq.) of chapter 14 of this title prior to editorial reclassification as chapter 46 (§ 5301 et seq.) of this title. children.text: an identification of all functions, other than the collection, management, and investment of Indian trust funds, that the Office of the Special Trustee performs independently or in concert with the BIA or other Federal agencies, specifically those functions that affect or relate to management of nonmonetary trust resources;

a description of any functions of the Office of the Special Trustee that will be transitioned to other bureaus or agencies within the Department prior to the termination date of the Office, as described in paragraph (3), together with the timeframes for those transfers; and

children.label: A
children.text: a statement of all reasons why the transition cannot be effected within that time; and

children.label: B
children.text: an alternative date for completing the transition.

children.heading: Fiduciary trust officers
children.label: b Fiduciary trust officers
children.text: Subject to applicable law and regulations, the Secretary, at the request of an Indian tribe or a consortium of Indian tribes, shall include fiduciary trust officers in a contract, compact, or other agreement under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ( et seq.).25 U.S.C. 4501See References in Text note below.1
shall cause the Office of the Special Trustee to terminate; or
affect the application of sections 4042 and 4043 of this title.
